name: io.github.pay-skill/pay-mcp
description: USDC payments for AI agents on Base — direct, tabs, x402 paywalls, discovery

environmentVariables.description: Private key hex for importing an existing wallet (optional — generates new wallet if not set)
environmentVariables.name: PAYSKILL_SIGNER_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Network to use: mainnet or testnet (default: mainnet)
environmentVariables.name: PAY_NETWORK
